title: Tick Control in North Castle, NY | $125–$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in North Castle, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Licensed experts. Call today for $125–$325 tick treatment!
intro: North Castle residents face significant tick exposure due to the town's wooded residential properties, extensive trails, and proximity to natural areas like Byram Lake Reservoir and Windmill Farm Preserve. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout North Castle, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments cover lawns, landscape borders, and wooded areas where ticks thrive in this beautiful Westchester community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has extensive experience protecting North Castle's unique estates and wooded properties from tick infestations. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively reducing tick populations throughout the season, and we understand the specific challenges posed by North Castle's rural character and abundant natural spaces.
localContext: North Castle's mix of historic estates, equestrian properties, and homes bordering conservation areas creates ideal tick habitats throughout neighborhoods like Banksville, Whippoorwill, and South Salem. Properties near the Mianus River Gorge, local riding trails, and the many wooded lots characteristic of this scenic town require professional tick management to ensure safe outdoor enjoyment year-round.

faqs.question: Why is tick control especially important in North Castle?
faqs.answer: North Castle's heavily wooded residential areas, equestrian facilities, and proximity to nature preserves create prime tick habitats. The town has one of the highest rates of Lyme disease in Westchester County, making professional tick control essential for protecting your family and pets during outdoor activities.

faqs.question: What does your North Castle tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved tick treatments to lawns, landscape perimeters, wooded edges, and high-risk areas. We focus on transition zones between manicured and natural areas where ticks are most active. Pricing ranges from $125–$325 depending on property size and treatment frequency.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick treatment in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Tick season in North Castle runs from early spring through late fall. We recommend starting treatments in April before peak tick activity and continuing with monthly or bi-monthly applications through October. Properties with heavy deer traffic or adjacent to wooded areas benefit most from season-long protection programs.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my North Castle property?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for children, pets, and the environment when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments are safe around equestrian facilities, gardens, and play areas. We provide specific re-entry instructions and can customize applications for properties with wells, ponds, or sensitive natural features common in North Castle.
